title: GWI POS Report Queue Item
description: Schema for queued report files under /opt/gwi-pos/state/report-queue/. Used for offline retry of reports to Mission Control. Queue retention limits: max 50 files, max 10 MB total, prune entries older than 7 days. When entries are pruned, a warning is logged to install-events.jsonl. Flushed on next successful heartbeat. Example: {"schema_version":"1.0","report_type":"baseline_drift","created_at":"2026-03-20T15:00:00Z","retry_count":2,"next_retry_at":"2026-03-20T15:04:00Z","payload":{"drift_detected":true,"drifted_items":["FIREWALL_DISABLED"]}}

report_type.description: Type of report being queued. Determines which MC endpoint will receive it.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this queue entry was first created.

retry_count.description: Number of delivery attempts so far. Incremented on each failed attempt. Used for exponential backoff calculation: delay = min(60 * 2^retry_count, 3600) seconds.

next_retry_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the next delivery attempt. Calculated using exponential backoff: 60s, 120s, 240s, 480s, ... max 3600s (1 hour).

payload.description: The actual report content to be delivered to MC. Structure depends on report_type. For baseline_drift: drift-scan data. For inventory: inventory data. For install_event: single event entry.
